overview: МебелМенаџер is a furniture company management system for optimizing order processing and truck loading. It features a product catalog with parts/dimensions, order management with emergency priority handling, a shipment planner, and an interactive 3D cargo visualizer where parts can be dragged, rotated, and auto-optimized for maximum truck utilization.
features: Products catalog with parts and L×W×H dimensions
Order management with emergency flag and deadline priority
Shipment planner grouped by deadline and emergency status
Interactive 3D cargo visualizer with drag, rotate, red-glow on overflow
Auto-optimize packing algorithm for truck loading
